rules.name: policy_requires_customer
rules.description: Every policy must reference an existing customer.

rules.name: claim_requires_policy
rules.description: Every claim must reference an existing policy.

rules.name: payment_requires_claim
rules.description: Every payment must reference an existing claim.

rules.name: claim_after_policy_start
rules.description: Claim date must be on or after the policy start date.

rules.name: payment_after_claim
rules.description: Payment date must be on or after the claim date.

rules.name: fraud_threshold
rules.description: A claim is fraud flagged when fraud_score is greater than or equal to 0.75.
